Pushing the Bridge Limits

Dave Sheingold Westchester Rockland News January 1997
Education

It sounded like a no-brainer: 13-ton school buses crossing 3-, 4- and 5-ton bridges... A follow-up story is planned in a few months to see what, if any, changes are really made.

It sounded like a no-brainer: 13-ton school buses crossing 3-, 4- and 5-ton bridges... A follow-up story is planned in a few months to see what, if any, changes are really made.
